function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: invoice copy needed"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — I’ve attached the 18-12-2025 invoice from Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed. Verification: attachment path was previously read; only one attachment so ordering rule satisfied; recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email; subject with colon-space properly quoted. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox file (already read earlier, satisfying deletion discipline).
next_step.observation: Created outbound email draft file at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task was 'Handle the next inbox item.' Completed by reading lowest inbox item, verifying identity and invoice, creating outbound draft with requested invoice, and deleting inbox file. Completeness: exactly one inbox request processed. Numeric arithmetic not applicable.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the requested resend workflow.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing a reply draft to Claudia with the requested Helios invoice (issued 2025-12-18) attached, then removed the processed inbox request.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS files when entering folders, used inbox-email and sending-email workflows, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email requested a resend of the 18-12-2025 Helios invoice. Canonical sender identity matched (10_entities/cast/claudia.md: primary_contact_email claudia@helios-tax.example), and the exact requested invoice exists (50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md with issued_on 2025-12-18 and counterparty Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH). An outbound draft was created in the correct lane and the inbox item was deleted per workflow.
